design_goals: Modernize traditional government forms without losing authority.
Clear, scannable data for Kepala, Admin, and Pegawai roles.
Replicate the structural integrity of the original leave form for the PDF export.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for Dashboards, Data correlation, and scanability
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat background, 1px solid border-[#E5E5DF], no shadow by default. hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

forms.input: Shadcn standard but with border-stone-300 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary. Always use explicit labels and helper text.
forms.select: Shadcn Select for Enum values (Jenis Cuti).

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A4331] text-white hover:bg-[#133224] px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1A4331] border border-[#1A4331] hover:bg-stone-50 px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

navigation.header: Sticky top, z-50, bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-stone-200. Must include Logo, User Profile, and Navigation Links.
navigation.sidebar: If used, flat white bg, 1px right border, primary color for active state with subtle background tint (#EAF4F0).

data_display.table: Dense padding for Admin views. left-aligned text, explicit data-testid for all rows.
data_display.status_badge: Rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider. Colored by semantic status (Setuju=Success, Ditangguhkan=Warning, Tidak Disetujui=Error).

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover states with higher contrast or slight lift (-translate-y-px).
interactions_and_motion.animations: Subtle fade-in for page loads, and slide-in for dialogs/modals.

testing_requirements.data_testid: MANDATORY on all buttons, links, form inputs, status badges, and menu items. Format: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., 'submit-leave-request-btn', 'input-jenis-cuti', 'approve-request-btn'.

pdf_print_rules.kop_surat: Center-aligned header with Government Logos, clear bold typography for 'PEMERINTAH KOTA SEMARANG', 'DINAS KESEHATAN', 'UPTD PUSKESMAS BUGANGAN', full horizontal rule (border-b-4 + border-b-1).
pdf_print_rules.structure: Replicate standard Indonesian formal form table structures. A4 dimensions, print-friendly borders, no background colors (bg-white).
pdf_print_rules.signatures: Tanda tangan blocks structured with name, NIP, and space for scanned signature image and QR code at bottom-left and bottom-right.

icons.usage: Use consistently for sidebar nav, action buttons (e.g., FileText, CheckCircle, XCircle, Clock).

login_background.description: Modern medical centre building with glass facade. Use with a dark green overlay (bg-[#1A4331]/80) to ensure login form readability.

dashboard_hero_illustration.description: Indonesian medical staff in a hallway. Subtle context image.
dashboard_hero_illustration.placement: Welcome banner in Pegawai dashboard or 'About/Info' sections.

form_empty_state.placement: Empty state illustration for 'No Leave Requests' or 'Approval Queue Empty'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the layout strictly follows the 'Control Room' bento grid pattern for dashboards.
Formulir cuti needs to map perfectly to the physical document when printed or exported as PDF.
Do NOT use pure #000000 for text. Use #1C1C1A.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive inputs, dropdowns, buttons, and row items.
Use Shadcn UI form components heavily customized to match the spacing and color guidelines.
For the 3 roles (Admin, Kepala, Pegawai), maintain visual consistency but use clear header titles or subtle structural shifts to distinguish the active role.
Implement clear Bahasa Indonesia terminology (Setuju, Ditangguhkan, Tidak Disetujui, Menunggu Keputusan).
